Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 037 [Šumma Izbu 22][via cams/gkab]

flake
flake 1flake 1

[* munus]⸢ŠAḪ⸣ AM.SI U₃.TU ZIut EREN₂ni KURti ana KUR UMUŠ KUR MANni

(flake 1) (If) a sow gives birth to an elephant: attack of the land's troops against a (foreign) land; the decisions for the land will change.

flake 22

[* munus]⸢ŠAḪ⸣ GU₄ U₃.TU LUGAL GABA.RI NU TUKUši

(flake 2) (If) a sow gives birth to an ox: the king will have no opponent.

flake 33

[* munus]⸢ŠAḪ⸣ UR.A U₃.TU KI.MIN<(LUGAL)> GABA.RI NU TUKUši AN.GE₆ d30

(flake 3) (If) a sow gives birth to an otter: the king will have no opponent; eclipse of the Moon.

flake 44

[* munus]ŠAḪ UR.BAR.RA U₃.TU UMUŠ KUR MANni EN-ša₂ ina-qar

(flake 4) (If) a sow gives birth to a wolf: the decisions for the country will change; its owner will be ruined.

flake 55

[* munus]ŠAḪ UR.GI₇ U₃.TU pu-uḫ-pu-ḫu-u₂ ina KUR GAL₂

(flake 5) (If) a sow gives birth to a dog: there will be strife in the land.

flake 66

* munusŠAḪ UR.KI U₃.TU EN munusŠAḪ ZAḪ₂

(flake 6) (If) a sow gives birth to a badger: the sow's owner will disappear.

flake 77

[*] munusŠAḪ KA₅.A U₃.TU TURer na-me-e

(flake 7) (If) a sow gives birth to a fox: reducing of the flocks.

flake 88

[* munus]ŠAḪ PIRIG.TUR U₃.TU EN-ša₂ E₂.GAL UŠde

(flake 8) (If) a sow gives birth to a leopard: its owner will lead (it) to the palace.

flake 99

[* munus]⸢ŠAḪ⸣ dNIN.KILIM U₃.TU EN-ša₂ uḫ-ta-na-[aq]

(flake 9) (If) a sow gives birth to a mongoose: its owner will be suffocated.

flake 1010

[...] U₃.TU EN-ša₂ ZALAG₂ir DINGIR [...]

(flake 10) [...] gives birth to [...]: its owner will be cheerful; the god [...]

(end surface missing)
